description: Add chaos/stress tests to navigation, menu, icon, and group-related side panel E2E tests. Covers rapid UI interactions, double-click prevention, and animation resilience.

userStories.title: Add chaos tests to side-panel-group-transitions.e2e.ts
userStories.description: Add stress tests for rapid tab open/close cycling that triggers group transitions, and multiple simultaneous plugin transitions.
acceptanceCriteria: New test.describe('stress') block exists in side-panel-group-transitions.e2e.ts
Rapid tab cycling test opens and closes a matching tab 5x in succession, verifying the plugin card ends up in the correct group (NOT CONNECTED if tab closed)
All stress tests assert zero pageerror events
npx playwright test e2e/side-panel-group-transitions.e2e.ts passes
userStories.notes:
Files:
- e2e/side-panel-group-transitions.e2e.ts (add stress describe block)

Context:
This file tests plugin cards moving between READY and NOT CONNECTED groups with fade animation. It uses startTestServer to create matching tabs. The test app URL is testServer.url. The file has a local helper `pluginAccordionItem()` that locates plugin cards.

Changes:
Add test.describe('stress') with rapid tab cycling test. Setup: standard server + test server + extension. Open side panel. Then loop 5x: open a new page to testServer.url (creates matching tab), wait for plugin to appear in READY group (poll /health for tabState='ready'), close the page, wait for plugin to return to NOT CONNECTED. After 5 cycles, verify plugin is in NOT CONNECTED group (since last action was close).

Constraints:
- Must wait for server health to confirm tab state between cycles — don't just click and hope
- Keep cycle delay reasonable (500ms between open/close) so animations can settle
- Do NOT modify existing tests

userStories.title: Add chaos tests to side-panel-icons.e2e.ts
userStories.description: Add stress test for rapid active/inactive icon state toggling.
acceptanceCriteria: New test.describe('stress') block exists in side-panel-icons.e2e.ts
Test opens and closes a matching tab 5x rapidly, verifying the plugin icon state (active vs inactive SVG) is correct after each transition
All stress tests assert zero pageerror events
npx playwright test e2e/side-panel-icons.e2e.ts passes
userStories.notes:
Files:
- e2e/side-panel-icons.e2e.ts (add stress describe block)

Context:
This file tests custom SVG icon loading, inactive vs active icon states, and letter avatar fallback. Icon state changes when tabs open/close (inactive = faded ghost border class `border-border/30`, active = no ghost border).

Changes:
Add test.describe('stress') with icon state toggle test. Setup with test server for matching tabs. Open side panel. Loop 5x: open tab to testServer.url, wait for icon to lose ghost border (ready state), close tab, wait for icon to show ghost border (inactive state). After final close, verify ghost border is visible.

Constraints:
- Icon state is determined by CSS class `border-border/30` on the icon wrapper
- Must poll /health between cycles for reliable state transitions
- Do NOT modify existing tests

userStories.title: Add chaos tests to side-panel-menu-version.e2e.ts
userStories.description: Add stress tests for rapid menu open/close and double-click prevention on Remove.
acceptanceCriteria: New test.describe('stress') block exists in side-panel-menu-version.e2e.ts
Rapid menu test opens/closes the plugin menu 10x, verifies version text is still correct
All stress tests assert zero pageerror events
npx playwright test e2e/side-panel-menu-version.e2e.ts passes
userStories.notes:
Files:
- e2e/side-panel-menu-version.e2e.ts (add stress describe block)

Context:
This file tests version display in the plugin menu dropdown. The menu trigger is the MoreHorizontal (3-dot) icon button. The menu opens via Radix DropdownMenu.

Changes:
Add test.describe('stress') with rapid menu open/close test. Setup: standard server + extension. Open side panel, wait for plugin visible. Locate the 3-dot menu button for the e2e-test plugin card. Loop 10x: click to open menu, wait 50ms, press Escape to close, wait 50ms. After loop, open menu one final time and verify the version text is still correct (matches package.json version).

Constraints:
- Menu button is inside the plugin card header, typically `button` with MoreHorizontal icon
- Use Escape key to close menu (Radix DropdownMenu responds to Escape)
- Do NOT modify existing tests

userStories.title: Add chaos tests to side-panel-open-tab.e2e.ts
userStories.description: Add stress tests for rapid icon clicks cycling through tabs and clicking icon immediately after closing a tab.
acceptanceCriteria: New test.describe('stress') block exists in side-panel-open-tab.e2e.ts
Rapid click test opens 3 matching tabs, then clicks the plugin icon 10x rapidly, verifying no crash
All stress tests assert zero pageerror events
npx playwright test e2e/side-panel-open-tab.e2e.ts passes
userStories.notes:
Files:
- e2e/side-panel-open-tab.e2e.ts (add stress describe block)

Context:
This file tests plugin icon click behavior — focusing tabs, cycling through multiple matching tabs, and opening homepage. The icon is inside the plugin card header. The file uses startTestServer and has a local helper `waitForPluginTabState()` to poll /health.

Changes:
Add test.describe('stress') with rapid icon click test. Setup: standard server + test server + extension. Open 3 tabs to testServer.url (creating 3 matching tabs). Wait for plugin to reach ready state. Open side panel. Then click the plugin icon 10x rapidly with 100ms between clicks. Verify no crash (page still renders, no pageerror events). Close all tabs.

Constraints:
- The plugin icon button is located inside the card header — look for the clickable icon that opens/cycles tabs
- After rapid clicking, just verify the side panel is still functional (E2E Test text visible)
- Do NOT modify existing tests

userStories.title: Add chaos tests to side-panel-browser-tool-groups.e2e.ts
userStories.description: Add stress tests for rapid search input changes with special characters and accordion collapse during search.
acceptanceCriteria: New test.describe('stress') block exists in side-panel-browser-tool-groups.e2e.ts
Rapid search test types 'tab', 'page', 'inspect' in 100ms succession, verifies no stale group rendering
Special characters test searches for '^$.*+' without crash
All stress tests assert zero pageerror events
npx playwright test e2e/side-panel-browser-tool-groups.e2e.ts passes
userStories.notes:
Files:
- e2e/side-panel-browser-tool-groups.e2e.ts (add stress describe block)

Context:
This file tests browser tool group headers rendering and search filtering. Search input filters tools by name/description. The file has a local helper `buildToolsMap()`. Browser card accordion locator: `sp.locator('button[aria-expanded]').filter({ hasText: 'Browser' })`.

Changes:
Add test.describe('stress') with two tests.

Test 1 — rapid search: Open side panel, expand browser card. Fill 'tab', 100ms tick, fill 'page', 100ms tick, fill 'inspect', 100ms tick. Clear. Verify browser tools are visible (expand card and check tool rows exist).

Test 2 — special chars: Fill search with '^$.*+()[]{}|\\'. Wait 300ms. Verify no crash (page still renders). Clear. Fill '< script>alert(1)</script>'. Wait 300ms. Verify no crash. Clear.

Constraints:
- Search is the main input at top of side panel
- After special char search, just verify E2E Test or Browser card is still visible after clearing
- Do NOT modify existing tests

userStories.title: Add chaos tests to side-panel-plugin-tool-groups.e2e.ts
userStories.description: Add stress test for rapid accordion expand/collapse with tool groups visible.
acceptanceCriteria: New test.describe('stress') block exists in side-panel-plugin-tool-groups.e2e.ts
Rapid toggle test expands/collapses the plugin card 10x, then verifies group headers still render correctly
All stress tests assert zero pageerror events
npx playwright test e2e/side-panel-plugin-tool-groups.e2e.ts passes
userStories.notes:
Files:
- e2e/side-panel-plugin-tool-groups.e2e.ts (add stress describe block)

Context:
This file tests plugin tool group headers rendering (e.g., 'Read', 'Write' group labels). The file has a local helper `buildToolsMap()`. Plugin card locator: `sp.locator('button[aria-expanded]').filter({ hasText: 'E2E Test' })`.

Changes:
Add test.describe('stress') with rapid toggle test. Open side panel, expand e2e card, verify group headers visible. Then loop 10x: click card (collapse), tick(30), click card (expand), tick(30). After loop, ensure card is expanded and verify at least one group header is still visible (e.g., a div with the group label text).

Constraints:
- Group headers are div elements with monospace uppercase text
- After rapid toggling, the card may be collapsed — check aria-expanded and click to expand if needed
- Do NOT modify existing tests
